title: About Me
text:
Employements
Private Tutor (Freelance) June 2022 – June 2025 (3 years) • Provided one-on-one tutoring in mathematics, geometry, physics and Turkish. • Helped students improve academic performance through personalized learning strategies. • Developed structured study plans and tracked student progress.

title: About Me
text:
Internships
AKDAŞ Döküm Sanayi ve Tic. A.Ş. — Production Intern August 2025 – September 2025 (1 month) • Observed casting production processes and quality control stages. • Collected and organized operational production data for reporting. • Analyzed workflow steps and supported documentation of production processes.
Yılmazlar Lastik & İnşaat — Operations Intern June 2024 – August 2024 (3 months) • Assisted daily operational processes and coordinated communication between suppliers, customers and field teams. • Organized operational data and supported workflow tracking in the office.

title: Assignment 1
text:
This assignment demonstrates a simple R calculation and a basic plot.


In this part we perform a simple arithmetic operation in R.

1 + 1

[1] 2


The result above shows how R evaluates basic expressions.



Here we create a simple scatter plot using the built-in cars dataset.

plot(cars)








The plot displays the relationship between car speed and stopping distance.

title: Assignment 2
text:
This assignment explores a small dataset and produces a simple visualization.


We calculate summary statistics for the built-in cars dataset.

summary(cars)

     speed           dist       
 Min.   : 4.0   Min.   :  2.00  
 1st Qu.:12.0   1st Qu.: 26.00  
 Median :15.0   Median : 36.00  
 Mean   :15.4   Mean   : 42.98  
 3rd Qu.:19.0   3rd Qu.: 56.00  
 Max.   :25.0   Max.   :120.00  


The summary function gives basic statistics such as minimum, maximum, mean and quartiles.



Now we visualize the distribution of car speeds.

hist(cars$speed)








The histogram shows how the car speeds are distributed in the dataset.
